title: HygeiaCloud: High performance. Low waste. Honest Pricing. | Product Hunt
excerpt: HygeiaCloud gives decommissioned enterprise GPUs a second life. We intercept NVIDIA A100s, H100s, and H200s before they reach the shredder, certify every unit through a 72-hour burn-in, and redeploy them at 40–70% below AWS and GCP pricing. Serious compute. Zero new hardware manufactured.
content_html: HygeiaCloud gives decommissioned enterprise GPUs a second life. We intercept NVIDIA A100s, H100s, and H200s before they reach the shredder, certify every unit through a 72-hour burn-in, and redeploy them at 40–70% below AWS and GCP pricing. Serious compute. Zero new hardware manufactured.
content_text: HygeiaCloud gives decommissioned enterprise GPUs a second life. We intercept NVIDIA A100s, H100s, and H200s before they reach the shredder, certify every unit through a 72-hour burn-in, and redeploy them at 40–70% below AWS and GCP pricing. Serious compute. Zero new hardware manufactured.

blocks.html_en: HygeiaCloud gives decommissioned enterprise GPUs a second life. We intercept NVIDIA A100s, H100s, and H200s before they reach the shredder, certify every unit through a 72-hour burn-in, and redeploy them at 40–70% below AWS and GCP pricing. Serious compute. Zero new hardware manufactured.

sentences.en: HygeiaCloud gives decommissioned enterprise GPUs a second life.
sentences.zh: HygeiaCloud 为退役企业 GPU 带来了第二次生命。

sentences.en: We intercept NVIDIA A100s, H100s, and H200s before they reach the shredder, certify every unit through a 72-hour burn-in, and redeploy them at 40–70% below AWS and GCP pricing.
sentences.zh: 我们在 NVIDIA A100、H100 和 H200 到达粉碎机之前拦截它们，通过 72 小时的老化来验证每个单元，并以比 AWS 和 GCP 定价低 40-70% 的价格重新部署它们。

content_html_zh: HygeiaCloud 为退役企业 GPU 带来了第二次生命。 我们在 NVIDIA A100、H100 和 H200 到达粉碎机之前拦截它们，通过 72 小时的老化来验证每个单元，并以比 AWS 和 GCP 定价低 40-70% 的价格重新部署它们。 认真计算。 零制造新硬件。
